mapper.sql: employee_id, employee_number, first_name, last_name, full_name, english_name, gender, date_of_birth, national_id, company_email, mobile_phone, marital_status, address_postal_code, address_city, address_district, address_street, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_relationship, emergency_contact_phone, bank_code, bank_branch_code, bank_account_number, bank_account_holder_name, organization_id, department_id, job_title, job_level, employment_type, employment_status, hire_date, probation_end_date, termination_date, termination_reason, termination_type, manager_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employees WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY employee_number
SELECT FROM employees WHERE manager_id = #{supervisorId} ORDER BY employee_number
SELECT FROM employees WHERE employment_status = #{employmentStatus} ORDER BY employee_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees ( employee_id, employee_number, first_name, last_name, full_name, english_name, gender, date_of_birth, national_id, company_email, mobile_phone, marital_status, address_postal_code, address_city, address_district, address_street, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_relationship, emergency_contact_phone, bank_code, bank_branch_code, bank_account_number, bank_account_holder_name, organization_id, department_id, job_title, job_level, employment_type, employment_status, hire_date, probation_end_date, termination_date, termination_reason, termination_type, manager_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{employeeNumber}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{fullName}, #{englishName}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{nationalId}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{maritalStatus}, #{addressPostalCode}, #{addressCity}, #{addressDistrict}, #{addressStreet}, #{emergencyContactName}, #{emergencyContactRelationship}, #{emergencyContactPhone}, #{bankCode}, #{bankBranchCode}, #{bankAccountNumber}, #{bankAccountHolderName}, #{organizationId}, #{departmentId}, #{jobTitle}, #{jobLevel}, #{employmentType}, #{employmentStatus}, #{hireDate}, #{probationEndDate}, #{terminationDate}, #{terminationReason}, #{terminationType}, #{supervisorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{isDeleted}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET employee_number = #{employeeNumber}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, full_name = #{fullName}, english_name = #{englishName}, gender = #{gender}, date_of_birth = #{birthDate}, national_id = #{nationalId}, company_email = #{email}, mobile_phone = #{phone}, marital_status = #{maritalStatus}, address_postal_code = #{addressPostalCode}, address_city = #{addressCity}, address_district = #{addressDistrict}, address_street = #{addressStreet}, emergency_contact_name = #{emergencyContactName}, emergency_contact_relationship = #{emergencyContactRelationship}, emergency_contact_phone = #{emergencyContactPhone}, bank_code = #{bankCode}, bank_branch_code = #{bankBranchCode}, bank_account_number = #{bankAccountNumber}, bank_account_holder_name = #{bankAccountHolderName}, organization_id = #{organizationId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, job_level = #{jobLevel}, employment_type = #{employmentType}, employment_status = #{employmentStatus}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, probation_end_date = #{probationEndDate}, termination_date = #{terminationDate}, termination_reason = #{terminationReason}, termination_type = #{terminationType}, manager_id = #{supervisorId}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE employee_id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE employees SET employment_status = 'TERMINATED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE employee_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM employees WHERE employee_number = #{employeeNumber})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM employees WHERE company_email = #{email})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM employees WHERE national_id = #{nationalId})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM employees WHERE employee_id = #{id})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(employee_number, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)) FROM employees WHERE employee_number LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')

SELECT FROM employees WHERE employee_id IN
#{item}
